project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake 应用程序.A.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.B.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.C.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.D.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.E.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.F.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.G.executor": "Debug", "CMake 应用程序.H.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.J.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.K.executor": "Run", "CMake 应用程序.M.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "fileTemplates", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
